app.title: VoteWise AI
app.subtitle: Ask me anything about voter registration, candidates, or the voting process

chat.placeholder: Ask about voter registration, EVM, candidates...
chat.welcome:
👋 Welcome! I'm **VoteWise AI**, your trusted election education assistant.

I can help you with:

🗳️ **Voter Registration** — Check eligibility, register online, track status

👥 **Candidate Information** — Factual, unbiased data on candidates & parties

📋 **Voting Process** — Step-by-step EVM/VVPAT guide, find your booth

What would you like to know?

quickActions.title: Quick Questions
quickActions.register: How do I register to vote?
quickActions.booth: How to find my polling booth?

footer.disclaimer: VoteWise AI provides educational information only. Always verify with official ECI sources.
